title: Mod Copper Item Recipes Compatible│模組銅物品配方兼容
description: You can use the new Copper Ingots with different rust levels added by the Copper Extension to craft the new Copper Pipes with different rust levels added by the Simple Copper Pipes.│你可以用銅擴展新增的不同生鏽程度的銅錠來合成簡單的銅管新增的不同生鏽程度的銅管。
body:
# Function│功能
Just like crafting a regular Copper Pipe when playing [Simple Copper Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes), you can craft a Copper Pipe of the corresponding rust level by simply replacing the material with the Copper Ingot variant added by the [Copper Extension](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension).│就像玩[簡單的銅管](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes)時合成一般的銅管一樣，你只要將材料替換成[銅擴展](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension)新增的銅錠變體就可以合成對應生鏽程度的銅管。
